work_performed: Structural steel erection Gridlines A-F Level 3 framing. Concrete deck pour Level 2 Gate Area B – 380 CY pumped. MEP rough-in Level 1 Connector Bridge underway. Airfield perimeter fence relocated at Taxiway Q junction. 228 workers on site.

Steel erection suspended AM due to wind gusts 28 mph. Resumed at 1300. Interior framing Level 1 Terminal Core 60% complete. Curtain wall anchor embed installation south facade. Precast spandrel panels lifted on east elevation floors 1-2. 195 workers on site.
delays: Wind hold AM – 2 hour delay steel erection

work_performed: Concrete pour Level 3 – 320 CY. Elevator pit waterproofing Gate Area A complete. MEP coordination on Level 2 – BIM clash resolution. Fire sprinkler main riser installation Terminal Core shaft. TSA checkpoint blocking framing started. 214 workers on site.

Structural steel Level 4 roof framing begins – first lifts made. Airfield concrete taxiway panel repairs Taxiway B. Loading dock canopy steel complete. HVAC main ductwork Level 1 installation 40% complete. 231 workers on site.
safety_incidents: Minor – laborer laceration on hand during rebar tying. First aid only.

work_performed: Roof steel erection progressing – 12 bays complete of 38. Exterior insulation and moisture barrier Level 1 south wall continuing. Airfield lighting conduit stubbed to new gate hardstands G1-G4. Baggage claim conveyor foundation pads poured. 220 workers on site.

Roof steel erection – 18 bays complete. Precast spandrel panels east elevation floors 1-3 complete. Electrical service entrance equipment set at main switchgear room. Plumbing drain rough-in Level 2 restrooms. 236 workers on site.
